response:
SOME EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL CEASE TO HOLD TRUE AROUND 2025 OR 2030 DUE TO PHYSICAL LIMITATIONS IN TRANSISTOR SCALING AND HEAT DISSIPATION ISSUES.
***
OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL EFFECTIVELY END BY 2035 WHEN CURRENT SILICON TECHNOLOGY REACHES ITS ABSOLUTE ATOMIC BOUNDARIES, FORCING THE INDUSTRY TO RELY ON ALTERNATIVE COMPUTING ARCHITECTURES LIKE QUANTUM OR NEUROMORPHIC SYSTEMS.
SOME
